{{Quote|You there, human... you are the one flying the ''Ebon Hawk'' now? I saw you disembark earlier.|translated=1|Lurze greeting [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="KOTOR" />}}
'''Lurze Kesh''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] who met [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] in [[Dreshdae]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]], in [[3956 BBY]]. He had been expecting a cargo of [[Spice/Legends|spice]] from [[Davik Kang]], and hoped Revan had it on the ''[[Ebon Hawk]]'', Davik's former ship. He also gave Revan a [[Mind prison|Rakatan prison]] to deliver to [[Motta]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="KOTOR" />
